system.description:
When you reach 7th level, there is nothing you can learn, no knowledge to base your future off, you have to create your own unique flame: You can choose one secondary spell school, spells from this school are considered fire lord spells. You learn two spells of your choice from this school, they do not count toward the number of spells you know.

In addition, choose one of the following features:

Sunfire

You are as brilliant as the sun. You can emit bright light in a radius of 15ft and dim light in an additional 15ft. You are immune to the blinded condition.

Once per Long Rest, when you cast a fire spell, any allies within 60ft of you can use their reaction to cast a gaze on your brilliant self, giving them an advantage on a check of their choice for the following minute.

Blazefire

Your fire inspires those around you. When an ally receives damage while within 30ft of you, you can use your reaction to reduce the damage by a number equal to twice your Constitution modifier.

Once per Long Rest, you can use your body and your flesh to further fuel your fire. When you cast a fire spell, you can roll a number of hit dice up to your Constitution modifier. You take damages which can’t be reduced equal to the roll you made and for each dice you rolled, you increase the DC of your spell by 1.

Sparkfire

Your flames are as frenetic and violent as yourself. When you hit a creature with a weapon attack, it takes an additional 1d6 fire damage.

Once per Long Rest, you can make your fire explode. When you cast a spell of 4th level or lower that deals damage, you can spend a number of spell points equal to twice the spell’s level and reroll any dice that have the maximum result and add them to the total. For example, if you cast an exploding fireball and roll three 6s among your damage dice, you roll an additional 3d6, and continue to reroll any 6s, adding them to the total damage dealt. You can roll a maximum additional number of damage dice up to twice your Constitution modifier.
